Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{s['name']} | {s['role']} | phone: {s['phone']}\\"\) for s in d.get\('staff',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); keys=list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\); print\('data keys:', keys\); items=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('menuItems',[]\) or d.get\('data',{}\).get\('menu',[]\); print\('items count:', len\(items\)\); print\('first item:', json.dumps\(items[0] if items else {}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('menuItems',[]\); print\('items count:', len\(items\)\); print\('first:', json.dumps\(items[0] if items else {}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('menuItems',[]\); print\('items:', len\(items\)\); print\('first:', items[0].get\('name'\) if items else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rid=d['data']['restaurant']['id']; print\('Restaurant ID:', rid\)")
